item.title: Pressure Washers Recalled Due to Serious Risk of Injury or Death from Shock and Electrocution Hazards; Imported by DGIVOVO US
item.company: Online at Amazon.com from October 2025 through January 2026 for about $90.
item.brand: Online at Amazon.com from October 2025 through January 2026 for about $90.
item.summary: This recall involves DGIVOVO US-branded pressure washers. The recalled, electric pressure washers are red, green or blue with black, and measure about seven inches high, nine inches wide and eight inches deep. They came with a 500 ml spray can attachment, foam cannon, four connect nozzles, a 20-foot hose and two rollers. "Model: C4012PLUS-1500C" is printed on a label located on the back of the pressure washers.
item.affectedPeople: Consumers who purchased: DGIVOVO US Electric Pressure Washers.
item.remedy: Consumers should immediately stop using the recalled pressure washers and contact DGIVOVO US for a free replacement pressure washer of at least equal value to the recalled pressure washer, including shipping. Consumers will be asked to destroy the pressure washer by unplugging it and cutting the power cord in half and send a photo of the destroyed power washer to dgivovo@163.com. Consumers should then dispose of the destroyed recalled product.
item.payoutAmount: Repair, refund, replacement, or other remedy if stated by the CPSC notice
